title: GoldenTestCase
description: Schema for YAML test case files in testdata/cases/. Each file describes one model + one input scenario for L4/L5 golden tests.

revision.description: HuggingFace model revision: a full commit SHA (preferred for reproducibility) or 'main'.

task_type.description: Task type string matching the mobius registry.

level.description: Test level(s) to run: L4 (checkpoint verified), L5 (generation E2E), or both.

prompts.description: Text prompts for text-generation, feature-extraction, seq2seq, and image-text-to-text tasks.

images.description: Image file paths relative to testdata/ (vision and vision-language tasks).

audio.description: Audio file paths relative to testdata/ (speech tasks).

decoder_prompt.description: Forced decoder prefix for seq2seq / encoder-decoder tasks. Empty string means no forced prefix.

inputs.description: Input data for the test case. All sub-fields are optional.

max_new_tokens.description: Maximum number of new tokens to generate.

do_sample.description: Whether to use sampling. false = greedy decoding (required for reproducible golden tests).

generation.description: HuggingFace GenerationConfig overrides. Only applicable for L5 generation tests.

trust_remote_code.description: Whether the HuggingFace model requires trust_remote_code=True.

skip_reason.description: If non-null/non-empty, the test is skipped with this message. Use for known failures or unimplemented features.

min_token_match_ratio.description: Per-case L5 tolerance override for token match ratio. Overrides the global value in default_tolerances.yaml. Use when the model has known float32 precision divergence vs HuggingFace (e.g. VL 3-model pipeline accumulates rounding error over decode steps).

notes.description: Human-readable description of the test case. Not parsed by the test runner.
